_provenance: Schema-derived from AC-P2.4.4. Account with zero symphonies must return an empty sentinel. Engine treats this as 'no port to evaluate'.
description: Empty symphony list returns sentinel result that is distinguishable from a valid port result.
derivation: AC-P2.4.4: account with zero symphonies -> aggregator returns an empty sentinel. The sentinel must be distinguishable from a valid port dict (e.g., has key 'empty_sentinel': True or 'value': 0 with a flag). Engine caller treats sentinel as 'no port to evaluate'.
